summary.en: The retained Regulation (EC) 1223/2009 (UK law) requires that cosmetic products be manufactured in compliance with Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP). The recognised GMP standard is ISO 22716:2007 (Cosmetics — Good Manufacturing Practices — Guidelines on Good Manufacturing Practices), which is also the EN ISO 22716:2007 harmonised standard referenced under the EU Cosmetics Regulation. Compliance with ISO 22716 is not mandatory certification — it is a benchmark of compliance with the GMP requirement. The UK RP does not need a third-party ISO 22716 certificate, but must be able to demonstrate that the manufacturing site operates according to GMP principles (personnel, premises, equipment, raw materials, production, finished products, quality control, outsourced activities, deviations, complaints, recalls). Enforcement (OPSS and Trading Standards) may request manufacturing documentation.
summary.zh: 保留的欧盟条例（EC）1223/2009（英国法律）要求化妆品须按照良好生产规范（GMP）进行生产。公认的GMP标准为ISO 22716:2007（化妆品——良好生产规范——良好生产操作指南），该标准亦为欧盟《化妆品条例》下引用的EN ISO 22716:2007协调标准。遵守ISO 22716不要求强制认证——它是满足GMP要求的合规基准。英国责任人无需提供第三方ISO 22716证书，但须能够证明生产场所按照GMP原则运营（人员、厂房、设备、原材料、生产、成品、质量控制、外包活动、偏差、投诉、召回）。执法机构（OPSS和贸易标准局）可能要求提供生产文件。
summary.zht: 保留的歐盟條例（EC）1223/2009（英國法律）要求化妝品須按照良好生產規範（GMP）進行生產。公認的GMP標準為ISO 22716:2007（化妝品——良好生產規範——良好生產操作指南），該標準亦為歐盟《化妝品條例》下引用的EN ISO 22716:2007協調標準。遵守ISO 22716不要求強制認證——它是滿足GMP要求的合規基準。英國責任人無需提供第三方ISO 22716證書，但須能夠證明生產場所按照GMP原則運營（人員、廠房、設備、原材料、生產、成品、質量控制、外包活動、偏差、投訴、召回）。執法機構（OPSS和貿易標準局）可能要求提供生產文件。

standards_or_laws: Retained Regulation (EC) No 1223/2009, Article 8 (GMP requirement) (as retained in UK law)
ISO 22716:2007 — Cosmetics — Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) — Guidelines on Good Manufacturing Practices

summary.en: China requires cosmetic manufacturers to comply with the Cosmetics Production Quality Management Standards (commonly called 'Cosmetics GMP'), effective from 2022, published by NMPA. This standard is aligned in principle with ISO 22716 but is a mandatory Chinese regulatory instrument — facilities must pass a GMP inspection by provincial market supervision authorities before receiving a cosmetics production licence. Third-party certification to ISO 22716 is not a substitute for the Chinese GMP licence. Chinese manufacturers with a valid cosmetics production licence have passed domestic GMP inspections, but UK/EU authorities do not accept the Chinese GMP licence as evidence of ISO 22716 compliance.
summary.zh: 中国要求化妆品生产企业遵守《化妆品生产质量管理规范》（通称'化妆品GMP'），于2022年由NMPA发布施行。该规范在原则上与ISO 22716一致，但属于强制性中国监管工具——企业须通过省级市场监督管理局的GMP检查，方可取得化妆品生产许可证。ISO 22716第三方认证不能替代中国GMP许可证。持有有效化妆品生产许可证的中国生产企业已通过国内GMP检查，但英国/欧盟主管机构不接受中国GMP许可证作为符合ISO 22716的证据。
summary.zht: 中國要求化妝品生產企業遵守《化妝品生產質量管理規範》（通稱'化妝品GMP'），於2022年由NMPA發布施行。該規範在原則上與ISO 22716一致，但屬於強制性中國監管工具——企業須通過省級市場監督管理局的GMP檢查，方可取得化妝品生產許可證。ISO 22716第三方認證不能替代中國GMP許可證。持有有效化妝品生產許可證的中國生產企業已通過國內GMP檢查，但英國/歐盟主管機構不接受中國GMP許可證作為符合ISO 22716的證據。

standards_or_laws: 化妆品生产质量管理规范 (2022) — Cosmetics Production Quality Management Standards (NMPA)
化妆品生产许可管理办法 (2021) — Measures for Administration of Cosmetics Production Licence

gap.en: The Chinese cosmetics GMP licence demonstrates domestic regulatory compliance but does not constitute evidence of ISO 22716 conformity for UK purposes. However, since ISO 22716 compliance is not a mandatory certification (only a GMP benchmark), UK RPs in practice rely on: (1) self-declaration by the manufacturer that the facility operates per ISO 22716; (2) audit reports from the UK RP or third-party auditors; (3) Chinese ISO 22716 certificates issued by accredited certification bodies (these are voluntary in China but carry weight with UK importers). If the manufacturing facility has a Chinese cosmetics production licence, this provides a baseline — but the UK RP should verify scope, documentation, and any deviations from ISO 22716 chapter coverage.
gap.zh: 中国化妆品GMP许可证证明了国内监管合规，但不构成英国所需的ISO 22716符合性证据。然而，由于ISO 22716合规不是强制性认证（仅为GMP基准），实践中英国责任人通常依赖：（1）制造商关于工厂按照ISO 22716运营的自我声明；（2）英国责任人或第三方审核员出具的审核报告；（3）由认可认证机构颁发的中国ISO 22716证书（在中国属自愿性质，但对英国进口商具有参考价值）。若生产设施持有中国化妆品生产许可证，可作为基础——但英国责任人应核实范围、文件及与ISO 22716章节覆盖的任何偏差。
gap.zht: 中國化妝品GMP許可證證明了國內監管合規，但不構成英國所需的ISO 22716符合性證據。然而，由於ISO 22716合規不是強制性認證（僅為GMP基準），實踐中英國責任人通常依賴：（1）製造商關於工廠按照ISO 22716運營的自我聲明；（2）英國責任人或第三方審核員出具的審核報告；（3）由認可認證機構頒發的中國ISO 22716證書（在中國屬自願性質，但對英國進口商具有參考價值）。若生產設施持有中國化妝品生產許可證，可作為基礎——但英國責任人應核實範圍、文件及與ISO 22716章節覆蓋的任何偏差。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory compliance with GMP principles (ISO 22716 is the recognised benchmark); third-party ISO 22716 certification is not mandatory but is accepted as evidence of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — cosmetics production licence required; GMP inspection by provincial authority; Cosmetics Production Quality Management Standards (2022) is the mandatory standard

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GMP compliance per ISO 22716 is mandatory in the UK under the retained Cosmetics Regulation. Third-party certification is not required, but the UK RP must be able to demonstrate GMP conformity. Chinese cosmetics production licences do not substitute. In practice, obtaining a voluntary ISO 22716 certificate from an accredited Chinese certification body is the most efficient way for Chinese manufacturers to evidence UK GMP compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考]依据保留的《化妆品条例》，按照ISO 22716实现GMP合规在英国为强制要求。不要求第三方认证，但英国责任人须能够证明GMP符合性。中国化妆品生产许可证不可替代。实践中，由认可的中国认证机构自愿获取ISO 22716证书，是中国生产企业证明英国GMP合规性最为高效的途径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考]依據保留的《化妝品條例》，按照ISO 22716實現GMP合規在英國為強制要求。不要求第三方認證，但英國責任人須能夠證明GMP符合性。中國化妝品生產許可證不可替代。實踐中，由認可的中國認證機構自願獲取ISO 22716證書，是中國生產企業證明英國GMP合規性最為高效的途徑。
